summary: Frontend-only testing of LED Sign Design Tool. All 20 specified features tested and passing. Font upload, pixel generation, UI controls, export panel all work correctly.

issues: After generate, status bar shows 'Selected: 0Border: 140Fill: 69' without spacing between labels - minor formatting

critical_code_review_comments: App.js line 243-249: canvas-toolbar pixel count uses wiringMode state but wiring mode selection in ExportPanel updates wiringMode via setWiringMode - the toolbar displays wiringMode correctly as 'snake'
Minor: Status bar text rendering lacks space separator between labels (CSS issue) - 'Selected: 0Border: 140' concatenated visually
context_for_next_testing_agent: App fully functional. Font upload via data-testid='font-file-input' works with /usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf. After generate, 209 pixels rendered for HELLO (140 border + 69 fill). P1 port shows 209/1024. Export DXF button updates to show pixel count. All 8 T8000 ports visible (P1-P8). Wiring modes Auto Snake / Click-to-Connect both visible. All display toggles work.
